message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
rectangle "DocumentationWidget" as DW
rectangle "IndexAbstractor" as IA

User -> DW : search
activate DW
DW -> IA : search(term)
activate IA
IA --> DW : return results
deactivate IA
DW --> User : display results
deactivate DW

@enduml
```
